title: Mahbubnagar Projects: Special Drive to Fast-track Works
description: Uttam said the government was firm on stepping up the pace of the works in progress with specific allocations of Rs.909 crore for Kalwakurthy, Rs.252 crore for Nettempadu, Rs.200 crore for Bhima, and Rs.185 crores for Koilsagar over the next one year.
